scripts.build: bun run --filter @git-ingest/core build && bun run --filter @git-ingest/cli build && bun run --filter @git-ingest/desktop build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @git-ingest/core test && bun run --filter @git-ingest/cli test && bun run --filter @git-ingest/desktop test
scripts.ci:test: bun run test && bun run test:smoke && bun run build
